lesson_name: Services, Blackboard Operations, and Complex Trees
description: Targets BT v1 weaknesses: services (75-88%), blackboard set/clear (88%), cooldown (90%), multi-branch trees (83-93%). Every category has 2+ examples with varied phrasing to prevent memorization. Also introduces new patterns: abort modes, nested selectors, service+decorator combos.

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree where a service scans for the closest Character every half second and stores it in the TargetActor blackboard key. If a target is found, chase it. Otherwise wait.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Scanner
BLACKBOARD: BB_Scanner

KEY TargetActor: Object

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=2000, Interval=0.5]
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Build an AI behavior tree. Attach a FindNearestActor service to the root that looks for players within 1500 units every 0.3 seconds, storing the result in a NearestPlayer key. If NearestPlayer is set, move to them. If not, print No players nearby and wait 2 seconds.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_PlayerFinder
BLACKBOARD: BB_PlayerFinder

KEY NearestPlayer: Object

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=NearestPlayer, SearchRadius=1500, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Pursue
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=NearestPlayer, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=NearestPlayer, AcceptableRadius=150]
  SEQUENCE: Idle
    TASK: PrintString [Message="No players nearby"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Make a behavior tree that continuously tracks distance to a target. Use an UpdateDistance service running every 0.25 seconds. If the distance is less than 300, attack. If less than 1000, chase. Otherwise idle.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_DistanceAI
BLACKBOARD: BB_DistanceAI

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.25]
  SEQUENCE: Attack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=300]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=20]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.8]
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=250]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Create an AI that uses a distance tracking service. The service checks how far the enemy is from its target every 0.5 seconds. When within 400 units, the AI should face the target and deal 15 damage. When farther away, move toward the target.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_RangeCheck
BLACKBOARD: BB_RangeCheck

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY Distance: Float = 9999.0

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=Distance, Interval=0.5]
  SEQUENCE: MeleeAttack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=Distance, Condition=LessThan, Value=400]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=15]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: Approach
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=300]

prompts.instruction: Build a behavior tree for a guard that checks line of sight to a target every 0.2 seconds using a CheckLineOfSight service. If the guard can see the target, chase. If not, patrol.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_SightGuard
BLACKBOARD: BB_SightGuard

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY CanSeeTarget: Bool = false
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: CheckLineOfSight [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=CanSeeTarget, Interval=0.2]
  SEQUENCE: ChaseVisible
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=CanSeeTarget, Condition=Equals, Value=true, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Make an AI that uses line of sight checks. A service runs every 0.3 seconds to see if the AI can see the enemy, storing the result in HasLOS. When HasLOS is true, move toward the enemy and attack for 10 damage. When false, stand still and print Lost sight.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_LOSAttacker
BLACKBOARD: BB_LOSAttacker

KEY EnemyActor: Object
KEY HasLOS: Bool = false

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: CheckLineOfSight [TargetKey=EnemyActor, ResultKey=HasLOS, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: AttackVisible
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=HasLOS, Condition=Equals, Value=true, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=EnemyActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=EnemyActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=EnemyActor, Damage=10]
  SEQUENCE: LostTarget
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Lost sight"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree where the AI always looks at its target using a DefaultFocus service while chasing. The service should keep focus on the TargetActor key.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_FocusChaser
BLACKBOARD: BB_FocusChaser

KEY TargetActor: Object

TREE:

SEQUENCE: Chase
  SERVICE: DefaultFocus [Key=TargetActor]
  DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]

prompts.instruction: Build an AI that maintains eye contact with the player while moving. Attach a DefaultFocus service targeting the PlayerActor blackboard key to the chase sequence. The AI should move to the player and then wait 1 second.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_EyeContact
BLACKBOARD: BB_EyeContact

KEY PlayerActor: Object

TREE:

SEQUENCE: ChaseWithFocus
  SERVICE: DefaultFocus [Key=PlayerActor]
  DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=PlayerActor, Condition=IsSet]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=PlayerActor, AcceptableRadius=150]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree where the AI sets a blackboard key AlertLevel to 2 when it sees a target, then clears it after investigating. Use SetBlackboardValue and ClearBlackboardValue tasks.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_AlertSystem
BLACKBOARD: BB_AlertSystem

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY AlertLevel: Int = 0
KEY LastKnownPos: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: React
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=AlertLevel, Value=2]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
  SEQUENCE: Investigate
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=AlertLevel, Condition=GreaterThan, Value=0]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=LastKnownPos, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=AlertLevel]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="All clear"]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Make an AI that writes and clears blackboard values. When it detects a threat, set IsAlert to true and chase. When the threat disappears, clear IsAlert and go back to waiting. Use SetBlackboardValue to set true and ClearBlackboardValue to reset.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_AlertToggle
BLACKBOARD: BB_AlertToggle

KEY ThreatActor: Object
KEY IsAlert: Bool = false

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: RespondToThreat
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=ThreatActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=IsAlert, Value=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=ThreatActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Engaging threat"]
  SEQUENCE: StandDown
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=IsAlert, Condition=Equals, Value=true]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=IsAlert]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Standing down"]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree where an AI attacks with a 2 second cooldown between strikes. When on cooldown, it circles the target by moving to a nearby position.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_CooldownFighter
BLACKBOARD: BB_CooldownFighter

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY CirclePoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
  SEQUENCE: Strike
    DECORATOR: Cooldown [Duration=2.0]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=20]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Strike!"]
  SEQUENCE: Circle
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=CirclePoint, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.5]

prompts.instruction: Build a behavior tree for a ranged attacker. The AI can fire every 3 seconds (use a Cooldown decorator). Between shots, it faces the target and waits. If no target, patrol.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_RangedAttacker
BLACKBOARD: BB_RangedAttacker

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY PatrolLocation: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: Shoot
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: Cooldown [Duration=3.0]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=30]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Fire!"]
  SEQUENCE: FaceTarget
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.5]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolLocation, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree with three services: FindNearestActor to locate threats, UpdateDistance to track range, and CheckLineOfSight for visibility. If visible and close, attack. If visible but far, chase. If not visible, patrol.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_FullSensor
BLACKBOARD: BB_FullSensor

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY HasLOS: Bool = false
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=2000, Interval=0.5]
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SERVICE: CheckLineOfSight [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=HasLOS, Interval=0.2]
  SEQUENCE: CloseAttack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=HasLOS, Condition=Equals, Value=true, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=400]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=15]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.8]
  SEQUENCE: ChaseVisible
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=HasLOS, Condition=Equals, Value=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=300]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=4.0]

prompts.instruction: Build a smart enemy AI with two services on the root: one finds the nearest player every second, another tracks distance every 0.3 seconds. The AI has four behaviors in priority order: attack if close (under 500), chase if medium range, investigate last known position if target lost, and idle if nothing is happening.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_SmartHunter
BLACKBOARD: BB_SmartHunter

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY LastKnownPos: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: FindNearestActor [Class=Character, ResultKey=TargetActor, SearchRadius=2500, Interval=1.0]
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Attack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=500]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=20]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=0.6]
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=400]
  SEQUENCE: Investigate
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=LastKnownPos, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=LastKnownPos, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=2.0]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=LastKnownPos]
  SEQUENCE: Idle
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Scanning area"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree demonstrating abort modes. The chase branch should use LowerPriority abort so it interrupts patrol when a target appears. The attack branch should use Both abort so it re-evaluates when the target is lost or distance changes.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_AbortDemo
BLACKBOARD: BB_AbortDemo

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Attack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=Both]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=300]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=10]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=250]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Build an AI with Self abort mode. The guard patrols normally, but if a target is set, it switches to chasing. The chase decorator uses Self abort — if the target key is cleared while chasing, the guard immediately stops and returns to patrol.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_SelfAbort
BLACKBOARD: BB_SelfAbort

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=Self]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=200]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Pursuing target"]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=4.0]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Patrolling"]

prompts.instruction: Create a behavior tree for a summoner AI. It moves to a spawn location, spawns an actor, waits 5 seconds, then repeats. Use SpawnActor and MoveTo tasks.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Summoner
BLACKBOARD: BB_Summoner

KEY SpawnLocation: Vector

TREE:

SEQUENCE: SummonLoop
  DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
  TASK: MoveTo [Key=SpawnLocation, AcceptableRadius=100]
  TASK: SpawnActor [Class=BP_Minion, Key=SpawnLocation]
  TASK: PrintString [Message="Summoned minion!"]
  TASK: Wait [Duration=5.0]

prompts.instruction: Make a behavior tree where the AI moves to a target, destroys it, then waits. If no target exists, idle.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_Destroyer
BLACKBOARD: BB_Destroyer

KEY TargetActor: Object

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: DestroyTarget
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: DestroyActor [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Target destroyed"]
    TASK: ClearBlackboardValue [Key=TargetActor]
  SEQUENCE: Idle
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Awaiting orders"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Create a complex behavior tree with a nested selector inside a sequence. The outer selector picks between combat and patrol. The combat sequence has an inner selector choosing between ranged attack (if far) and melee attack (if close).
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_CombatAI
BLACKBOARD: BB_CombatAI

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY PatrolPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.3]
  SEQUENCE: Combat
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    SELECTOR: ChooseAttack
      SEQUENCE: Melee
        DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=300]
        TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
        TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=25]
        TASK: Wait [Duration=0.5]
      SEQUENCE: Ranged
        TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
        TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=10]
        TASK: Wait [Duration=1.5]
  SEQUENCE: Patrol
    DECORATOR: Loop [InfiniteLoop=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPoint, AcceptableRadius=50]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=3.0]

prompts.instruction: Build a behavior tree for a boss enemy. It has three phases based on different conditions. Phase 1: if target is far, summon minions and wait. Phase 2: if target is medium range, chase aggressively. Phase 3: if target is close, do a heavy attack with 50 damage and 3 second cooldown. Use a selector with three sequences.
prompts.expected_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: BT_BossAI
BLACKBOARD: BB_BossAI

KEY TargetActor: Object
KEY DistToTarget: Float = 9999.0
KEY SpawnPoint: Vector

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SERVICE: UpdateDistance [TargetKey=TargetActor, ResultKey=DistToTarget, Interval=0.2]
  SEQUENCE: HeavyAttack
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=300]
    DECORATOR: Cooldown [Duration=3.0]
    TASK: RotateToFaceBBEntry [Key=TargetActor]
    TASK: ApplyDamage [Key=TargetActor, Damage=50]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Heavy attack!"]
  SEQUENCE: AggressiveChase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=DistToTarget, Condition=LessThan, Value=1000]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=250]
  SEQUENCE: Summon
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet]
    TASK: SpawnActor [Class=BP_Minion, Key=SpawnPoint]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Rise, my minions!"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=5.0]
